user_claim: Customer: Parking lot mein meri car ko scrape lag gaya. | Support: Aap kis type ka damage report karna chahte hain? | Customer: Front side par mark aa gaya hai, bumper ke upar. | Support: Light damage hai ya body par scratch? | Customer: Light theek hai, front bumper par scratch hai. Photos upload kar diye hain.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The first image (img_1) clearly shows a scrape and dent on the front bumper, which aligns with the user's claim. The second image (img_2) does not show any damage but is not relevant to the claim.
claim_status_justification: The image img_1 clearly shows a scrape and dent on the front bumper, which directly supports the user's claim of damage to that specific area.
